title: helichrysum teretifolium
intro: Helichrysum teretifolium, also known as Immortelle or Everlasting Flower, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Helichrysum teretifolium include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Helichrysum teretifolium is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
